metadata.description: Documentation tooling: a docs-tracking bootstrapper for any repo, and product-doc / changelog / release generation.

plugins.name: docs-tracking
plugins.description: Bootstrap a self-maintaining docs-tracking system (ROUTE_REFERENCE + SYSTEM_DOCS + read-before/update-after loop) in any repo. Self-contained.

plugins.name: doc-generation
plugins.description: Generate customer-facing product docs, screenshots, KB sync (Pylon/Zendesk) and Slack/email release announcements. Doc-writing skills run anywhere; screenshot/sync/release steps use the hub's Python toolchain via $DOC_AI_HUB.
